notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Luis Castillo. Corbin Carroll scores. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno singles on a pop up to right fielder Luke Raley.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Victor Robles singles on a ground ball to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Randy Arozarena scores. Luke Raley to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa hits a sacrifice bunt. Tim Tawa to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Victor Robles walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Victor Robles singles on a ground ball to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Randy Arozarena scores. Luke Raley to 3rd.
